privileged_info_summary: The create_dashboard@1 task requires an agent to log into Emoncms (a real open-source energy monitoring system by OpenEnergyMonitor) at http://localhost using admin credentials (username: admin, password: admin), navigate to the Dashboards page, and create a new dashboard with the exact name 'Home Energy Monitor', which must appear in the dashboards list upon completion. The task has a 180-second timeout and allows maximum 25 agent steps (200ms each). Verification is done programmatically via stub verifier that delegates to external VLM evaluation. Emoncms is deployed via official Docker image openenergymonitor/emoncms:latest using MySQL database and Redis caching. The environment contains synthetic energy monitoring data: 30 days of historical data across feeds for House Power, Solar PV, Heat Pump, Appliances, and Temperature monitoring, generated during setup. Dashboard creation in Emoncms is done through the GUI, not via API.
